## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding session to discuss GrowthX's strategy, vision, and current focus areas.](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX operates on two levels: customer-facing service layer and underlying AI/expert workflow platform](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Platform aims to scale expertise, improve with better models, and learn from each interaction](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Current focus: consistently delivering high-quality output, scaling capacity non-linearly with human resources](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Developing client-facing dashboard (Atlas) for analytics, opportunity tracking, and eventual self-service capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Business Model

  - [Two-sided approach: customer-facing service layer and underlying AI/expert workflow platform](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Service layer helps understand customer needs and market demand](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Underlying platform consists of AI workflows and expert layer for scalable expertise](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Common core being built to potentially expand into multiple service areas beyond content](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

### Platform Architecture and Vision

  - [Three key layers: service, AI workflow, and expert](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Goal: reproduce expert thought processes in scalable workflows](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Principle 1: Improve as AI models advance (faster, better, cheaper)](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Principle 2: Learn and improve with each iteration](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Aiming for no sunken costs by building solutions for immediate, paid use-cases](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)

### Workflow and Improvement Process

  - [Inputs, outputs, workflows, context generation, and expert interventions](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Learning from expert feedback to improve workflows](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Comprehensive evaluation of outputs (e.g., groundness, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Agentic planning and improvement based on evaluations](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

### Client-Facing Platform Development (Atlas)

  - [Phased approach to client access:](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
    1.  Analytics dashboard
    2.  Opportunity inventory view
    3.  Commenting and improvement capabilities
    4.  Self-service execution and AI assistant access
  - [AI assistant for content creation (demo'd with abnormals example)](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

### Current Challenges and Focus Areas

1.  Ensuring consistent high-quality output and customer experience
2.  Scaling capacity without linear human resource growth
3.  Managing rapid growth and market demand

## Next Steps

  - [Continue development of Atlas platform for client access](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Improve workflow adaptability across clients](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Explore potential for video content creation (pending API/model availability)](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Focus on maintaining quality while scaling capacity non-linearly](https://fathom.video/share/r-CJEjsighsR3UqLAj3L_kTjrXgkGZjh?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
